# taikun_group (Data Source)

Taikun Group Data Source



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `account_id` (Number) Account ID the group belongs to.
- `id` (String) Group's ID.

### Read-Only

- `claim_value` (String) Claim value for the group.
- `name` (String) Group's name.
